name: Zucchini Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the shredded zucchini, lightly beaten egg, baking mix, grated Parmesan cheese, and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Drop batter by 1/4 cupfuls into the hot oil and flatten with a spatula.
4. Fry until golden brown on one side.
5. Turn the pancakes over and cook the other side until golden brown.
